title: Design Assistant / Interior Designer
description:
About Apartment Private Ltd

At Apartment Private Ltd, we are passionate about transforming homes into thoughtfully designed spaces that reflect each client’s unique story. As a boutique interior design and renovation firm, we pride ourselves on creativity, craftsmanship, and a strong collaborative spirit. Our close-knit team values work-life balance and continuous learning—making us the ideal home for designers who want to grow personally and professionally.

About the Role

We are hiring Interior Designers at all stages—from fresh graduates to experienced professionals. Whether you’re exploring your first steps into the design industry or ready to run your own projects, we have a place for you.

You will work on a variety of residential and commercial projects and play an integral role in turning concepts into reality. Depending on your experience, you may start as a Design Assistant with full mentorship, or as an Interior Designer with independent responsibilities and leadership opportunities.

Which Path Is Right for You?

RoleDesign AssistantInterior DesignerSuitable forFresh grads, mid-career switchers1–2+ years experienceResponsibilitiesAssist in design research, drawings, and site coordinationLead design projects from concept to completionSoftware SkillsBasic knowledge or willingness to learnProficient in AutoCAD, SketchUp, Adobe SuiteCareer ProgressionMentored into Interior DesignerProgress into Lead Designer / Team Leader

Key Responsibilities (Both Roles, Adjusted to Experience)

  • Support or lead the development of design concepts, space planning, and mood boards.
  • Produce technical drawings, material boards, and 3D visualizations.
  • Communicate with clients to understand needs and present design proposals.
  • Collaborate with contractors and suppliers to ensure smooth execution.
  • Participate in site visits, inspections, and project meetings.
  • Stay updated on design trends, finishes, and sustainable practices.

What We’re Looking For

  • A strong passion for interior design, creativity, and attention to detail.
  • Good communication skills and a willingness to collaborate.
  • Eagerness to learn (for entry-level) or confidence in project handling (for experienced).
  • Familiarity with design software (training will be provided for new learners).

Why Join Us?

  • Structured Growth Path: Begin as a Design Assistant and grow into a Lead Designer with mentorship, hands-on experience, and increasing responsibilities.
  • Family-Friendly Culture: Enjoy flexible work schedules, paid family leave, and a healthy work-life balance.
  • Creative Freedom: Contribute ideas and see them come to life across diverse projects.
  • Hybrid Work Model: A mix of on-site involvement and remote flexibility.
  • Performance-Based Earnings:
    Design Assistant: Base Salary (SGD 800 – 1,500) + Tiered Profit Sharing
    Interior Designer: Higher base + Project Profit Commission + Monthly Incentives

How We Measure Success

We use clear KPIs to support and reward your growth:

  • Project profitability
  • Client satisfaction
  • On-time delivery
  • Team collaboration

Real Success Story

One of our designers joined us as a fresh graduate with no prior experience. Through structured mentorship and on-the-job training, she became a Lead Designer within 2 years, heading her own projects with confidence and pride.

How to Apply

Send your resume and portfolio (or creative projects/mood boards if you’re just starting out) to hello@apartment-interior.com.
We’re excited to meet designers who want to make meaningful spaces with us!

Interior Design Studio

A boutique interior design house that consists of quirky individuals.


"Where IDEAS take FORM"


We welcome any individual who love designing, self-motivated & willing to grow together!
